item.title: 21.99 万元起，新一代小米 SU7 正式发布，雷军：未来三年 AI 投资 600 亿元
item.guid: 21.99-万元起，新一代小米-SU7-正式发布，雷军：未来三年-AI-投资-600-亿元
item.description:
Last night, Xiaomi held its spring new product launch event, officially introducing the new generation SU7. 昨晚，小米召开春季新品发布会，正式推出新一代 SU7。

🔗 Related reading: Starting from 219,900 yuan! The new generation Xiaomi SU7 has become stronger and more expensive 🔗 相关阅读： 21.99 万元起！新一代小米 SU7 变强了，也变贵了

First, let's look at the prices: Standard version 219,900 yuan, Pro version 249,900 yuan, Max version 303,900 yuan, all increased by 4,000 yuan compared to the first generation of the same versions. 先看价格：标准版 21.99 万元、Pro 版 24.99 万元、Max 版 30.39 万元，较第一代同版本均上调 4000 元。

Approximately 34 minutes after the press conference, Xiaomi Auto's official Weibo announced that the number of locked orders had reached 15,000 units. 发布会结束后约 34 分钟，小米汽车官方微博宣布锁单量已达 1.5 万台。

Building on the first-generation design language, the new-generation SU7 adds three new color options: Capri Blue, Crimson Red, and Indigo Green. The entire series offers a total of 9 body colors and 6 wheel designs. 新一代 SU7 在整体外观延续第一代设计语言的基础上，新增卡布里蓝、赤霞红、靛石绿三款配色，全系共提供 9 款车身颜色和 6 款轮毂设计。

    Equipped with a V6s Plus super motor, with a peak power of 392 horsepower and a maximum speed of 22000rpm;

    The Pro version is equipped with a 96.3kWh battery, offering a CLTC range of 902km; the Max version (four-wheel drive) has a CLTC range of 835km, 0-100km/h acceleration in 3.08s, and a top speed of 265km/h. The Max version can replenish 670km of CLTC range in just 15 minutes;

    First to feature the "Xiaomi Jiaolong Chassis," with all models standardly equipped with front double wishbone and rear five-link independent suspension. The Pro and Max versions come with closed dual-chamber air springs and CDC® variable damping shock absorbers. The 100-0km/h dry braking distance is 33.3m, with no fade after 40 consecutive braking events;

    All models come standard with lidar, 4D millimeter-wave radar, NVIDIA Thor chip with 700TOPS computing power, and 25 safety assistance features, including AES emergency steering assist, which can actively avoid obstacles up to 2 times consecutively in high-speed emergencies;

    All models come standard with an "embedded roll cage" made of 2200MPa Xiaomi ultra-high-strength steel, extending from the A-pillar to the C-pillar, with upgraded four-door anti-collision beams of the same specification; all models come standard with 9 airbags, with 2 new rear side airbags;

    The interior has been completely redesigned, with the center console adopting a symmetrical layout. Two new interior colors, Midnight Black and Sandstone Beige, have been added. All models come standard with 18-way adjustable sports seats for the driver, with cushion support increased by 24% and comfort by 33%;

    The door handles feature a triple redundancy solution: an external mechanical handle, a redundant backup power supply for the door lock, and an internal emergency mechanical handle, fully complying with the new national standard requirements for 2027.

At the press conference, Lei Jun also reported on the latest developments in the AI field. Lei Jun stated that Xiaomi plans to invest over 60 billion yuan in the AI field over the next three years , with AI R&D and capital expenditures exceeding 16 billion yuan this year. 发布会上，雷军还汇报了 AI 领域的最新进展。 雷军表示，小米未来三年计划在 AI 领域总投入超过 600 亿元 ，今年 AI 研发和资本开支将超过 160 亿元。

According to data released by Xiaomi, the average age of the members of Xiaomi's cutting-edge technical team behind the MiMo model is only 25, with over 60% being students from Tsinghua and Peking Universities. 另据小米官方发布的数据，MiMo 模型背后的小米技术尖刀团队成员平均年龄仅 25 岁，清北学生占比超六成。

This press conference also brought two new products: 此次发布会一同带来的还有两款新品：

    Xiaomi Book Pro 14 laptop, equipped with up to the 3rd Gen Intel® Core™ Ultra X7 processor, weighing 1.08kg and 14.95mm thick, starting at 8499 yuan;

    Xiaomi Watch S5 46mm smartwatch, equipped with an 815mAh battery, offering up to 21 days of Bluetooth battery life, starting at 1199 yuan.

item.title: 机构：苹果折叠屏有望拿下 28% 市场份额
item.guid: 机构：苹果折叠屏有望拿下-28%-市场份额
item.description:
Recently, market research firm Counterpoint Research released a forecast that Apple's first foldable iPhone (possibly named iPhone Ultra) is expected to capture 28% of the foldable phone market in its first year, closely challenging Samsung's leading position. 近日，市场研究机构 Counterpoint Research 发布预测，苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone（或命名为 iPhone Ultra）预计将在入局折叠屏市场的首年便拿下 28% 的市场份额，直逼三星的头部地位。

Counterpoint believes that driven by factors such as Apple's entry, the continuation of the high-end trend, and the participation of more OEM manufacturers, global foldable smartphone shipments are expected to achieve a 20% year-on-year growth this year. Counterpoint 认为，受苹果入局、高端化趋势延续以及更多 OEM 厂商参与等因素驱动，今年全球折叠屏智能手机出货量预计将实现 20% 的同比增长。

item.title: 小云雀 AI 上线短剧 Agent：搭载 Seedance 2.0，10 万字剧本一键成片
item.guid: 小云雀-AI-上线短剧-Agent：搭载-Seedance-2.0，10-万字剧本一键成片
item.description:
Yesterday, ByteDance's one-stop AI content creation platform "Xiaoyunque AI" officially launched its short-drama Agent feature. Based on the Seedance 2.0 model, this feature supports uploading scripts of up to 100,000 characters, generating finished videos with one click, achieving full-process automated production from script to series. 昨天，字节跳动旗下一站式 AI 内容创作平台「小云雀 AI」正式上线短剧 Agent 功能，基于 Seedance 2.0 模型，该功能支持上传最多 10 万字剧本，一键直出视频成片，实现从剧本到剧集的全流程自动化制作。

🔗 Related reading: Hands-on with Xiaoyunque's latest Agent powered by Seedance 2.0: I generated a Dragon King Son-in-Law short drama with one click 🔗 相关阅读： 实测 Seedance 2.0 加持的小云雀最新 Agent，我一键生成了龙王赘婿短剧

After creators upload a script and confirm basic parameters such as art style, aspect ratio, and narration, the Agent automatically completes processes like story blueprint construction, character design, and storyboard generation. It supports one-click video generation and also allows custom editing of storyboards and characters. 创作者上传剧本后，完成画风、画幅、旁白等基础参数确认，Agent 即可自动完成故事蓝图构建、角色设计、分镜生成等流程，既支持一键生成成片，也开放分镜和角色的自定义编辑。

At the script understanding level, the short-drama Agent can deeply analyze the complete script, precisely sort out complex worldviews, timelines, and character relationships, and automatically scan the entire script to intelligently track character image changes throughout their lifecycle, covering details such as age, clothing, and facial features. 在剧本理解层面，短剧 Agent 可深度解析完整剧本，精准梳理错综复杂的世界观、时间线与人物关系，并自动扫描全剧本、智能追踪角色全生命周期的形象变化，涵盖年龄、服饰、面部特征等细节。

In terms of art style, the platform offers three major visual styles: 2D, 3D, and hyperrealistic, and supports intelligent matching based on story type. It also provides a one-click narration adaptation function, which can convert performance-based scripts into commentary scripts. 画风方面，平台提供 2D、3D、仿真人三大类视觉风格，并支持根据故事类型智能匹配，同时提供旁白一键改编功能，可将演绎类剧本转化为解说剧本。

item.title: iOS 26.4 RC 修复键盘漏字 bug
item.guid: iOS-26.4-RC-修复键盘漏字-bug
item.description:
Yesterday, Apple pushed iOS 26.4 RC (Release Candidate) to developers, with the official version expected to be released next week. The update log states that this version has "improved keyboard accuracy when typing quickly," fixing the issue of missing characters during keyboard input that has plagued many users since the release of iOS 26. 昨天，苹果向开发者推送了 iOS 26.4 RC（发布候选版），正式版预计下周推送。更新日志中称该版本已「改善了快速打字时的键盘准确性」，修复了自 iOS 26 发布以来困扰大量用户的键盘输入漏字问题。

Since upgrading to iOS 26, some users of iPhone 17 and other models have reported that the system inexplicably drops some characters when typing quickly. Although visual feedback on the screen shows that the user did touch the corresponding key, the character was not actually entered successfully, affecting the typing experience. 自升级 iOS 26 系统后，部分 iPhone 17 等机型用户反映，在快速打字时系统会无故漏掉部分字符。尽管屏幕上的视觉反馈显示用户确实触控了对应按键，但实际上字符并没有成功输入，影响输入体验。

Multiple users in the comment section confirmed the prevalence of the above issue. Some users stated that the problem has persisted for several months, mainly concentrated in two scenarios: the spacebar and selecting suggested words; other users even thought their typing habits had deteriorated until they confirmed it was a system-level bug, which brought them relief. 多位用户在评论区印证了上述问题的普遍性。有用户表示该问题已持续数月，主要集中在空格键和选择联想词两个场景；也有用户称曾一度以为是自身打字习惯变差，直到确认这是系统层面的 bug 才释怀。

item.title: 电脑端微信 4.1.8 更新，三项新功能上线
item.guid: 电脑端微信-4.1.8-更新，三项新功能上线
item.description:
Yesterday, the desktop version of WeChat updated to version 4.1.8, bringing three new features: 昨天，电脑端微信更新至 4.1.8 版本，带来三项新功能：

  • Added voice input function: hold down Ctrl + Win keys or click the microphone icon in the chat box to enable "voice to text"; the corresponding key for Mac systems is the Fn key. If you don't want to keep holding it down, you can use Ctrl + Win + Shift (⌘ + Fn for Mac) as a hands-free shortcut key; 新增语音输入功能，可按住 Ctrl + Win 键或点击聊天框内的话筒图标启用「语音转文字」，Mac 系统对应按键为 Fn 键；若不希望持续按住，可使用 Ctrl + Win + Shift（Mac 为 ⌘ + Fn）作为免持快捷键；
  • Added a one-click function to recall all messages, supporting the recall of multiple-selection forwarded and bulk-sent images, videos, and files; 新增一键撤回所有消息的功能，支持撤回多选转发和批量发送的图片、视频及文件；
  • Supports video playback at multiple speeds. 支持视频倍速播放。

item.title: 深圳 17 岁高中生回应成 Kimi 论文第一作者
item.guid: 深圳-17-岁高中生回应成-Kimi-论文第一作者
item.description:
According to a report by "Yangtze Evening Post", the Kimi team under Moonshot AI recently published a technical paper proposing a brand new "Attention Residuals" mechanism, which fundamentally reconstructs the traditional residual connection architecture that has been used in the field of deep learning for nearly a decade. 据《扬子晚报》报道，月之暗面（Moonshot AI）旗下 Kimi 团队近日发布一篇技术论文，提出全新的「注意力残差」（Attention Residuals）机制，对深度学习领域沿用近十年的传统残差连接架构进行了颠覆性重构。

Guangyu Chen (陈广宇), who topped the author list, quickly garnered widespread attention—he is a high school senior from an international school in Shenzhen, Guangdong, only 17 years old this year, and is expected to graduate in June. 排在作者名单首位的 Guangyu Chen（陈广宇）迅速引发广泛关注——他是来自广东深圳一所国际学校的高三在读生，今年仅 17 岁，预计今年 6 月毕业。

Facing the ensuing widespread attention, Chen Guangyu specifically named three equally contributing authors and team colleagues responsible for model expansion and infrastructure construction in his WeChat Moments post, stating that this work was "indispensable." 面对随之而来的大量关注，陈广宇在朋友圈发文时特意点名三位同等贡献作者，以及负责模型扩展与基础设施搭建的团队同事，称这项工作「缺一不可」。

He repeatedly emphasized in interviews: "Don't create a god; I hope the outside world writes less about individuals and more about the technology and the team. This is a collective achievement." Kimi's official statement also echoed this, saying that the paper is the result of the entire team's collaborative research. 他在接受采访时多次强调：「不要造神，希望外界少写个人、多写技术和团队，这是大家共同完成的成果。」Kimi 官方也同样表态，这篇论文是整个团队协作的研究成果。

item.title: OpenAI 收购 Python 工具公司 Astral
item.guid: OpenAI-收购-Python-工具公司-Astral
item.description:
OpenAI announced yesterday that it will acquire Astral, an open-source Python development tools company, aiming to integrate Astral's toolchain into OpenAI's Codex programming agent ecosystem. OpenAI 昨天宣布将收购开源 Python 开发工具公司 Astral，旨在将 Astral 旗下的工具链整合进 OpenAI 的 Codex 编程智能体生态。

Astral owns three widely used open-source tools in the Python developer community: uv for dependency and virtual environment management, Ruff as the fastest code checker and formatter currently available, and ty, which focuses on type safety checking. Astral 旗下拥有三款在 Python 开发者社区中广泛使用的开源工具：uv 负责依赖管理与虚拟环境管理，Ruff 是目前速度最快的代码检查与格式化工具，ty 则专注于类型安全检查。

Thibault Sottiaux, head of OpenAI Codex, stated: "Astral's tools are used by millions of Python developers. Bringing their expertise and ecosystem into OpenAI will accelerate our vision for Codex: to make it the most capable agent for the entire software development lifecycle." OpenAI Codex 负责人 Thibault Sottiaux 表示：「Astral 的工具被数百万 Python 开发者使用。将他们的专业能力和生态系统引入 OpenAI，将加速我们对 Codex 的愿景：让其成为最能胜任整个软件开发生命周期的智能体。」

OpenAI also pledged to continue supporting Astral's open-source projects after the acquisition. OpenAI 同时承诺，交易完成后将继续支持 Astral 的开源项目。

item.title: 阿里发布最新财报：AI 收入连续十季三位数增长、五年云收入目标超千亿美元
item.guid: 阿里发布最新财报：AI-收入连续十季三位数增长、五年云收入目标超千亿美元
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba Group released its Q3 FY2026 earnings report (Q4 calendar year 2025), with revenue of 284.843 billion yuan and adjusted net profit of 16.71 billion yuan. Excluding revenue from disposed businesses of Intime and Sun Art Retail, revenue increased by 9% year-over-year. 昨天，阿里巴巴集团发布 2026 财年第三季度财报（自然年 2025 年四季度），营收 2848.43 亿元，调整后净利润 167.1 亿元。若不计入银泰和高鑫零售的已处置业务收入，同比增长 9%。

  • Regarding AI business, Alibaba Cloud's revenue increased by 36% year-over-year, external commercialization revenue increased by 35% year-over-year, and AI-related product revenue achieved triple-digit year-over-year growth for the tenth consecutive quarter; AI 业务方面，阿里云收入同比增长 36%，外部商业化收入同比增长 35%，AI 相关产品收入连续第十个季度实现三位数同比增长；
  • At the chip level, Pingtouge's self-developed GPU appeared in Alibaba's financial report for the first time, with a cumulative large-scale delivery of 470,000 units, over 60% of which serve external commercial clients. Wu Yongming revealed that Pingtouge's current annualized revenue has reached the tens of billions level, and an IPO in the future is not ruled out; 芯片层面，平头哥自研 GPU 首次出现在阿里财报中，已累计规模化交付 47 万片，其中 60% 以上服务于外部商业化客户。吴泳铭透露，平头哥目前年化营收规模已达百亿级别，未来不排除推进 IPO；
  • Regarding the model layer, in February this year, Alibaba released its new generation large model, Qwen3.5-Plus. Wu Yongming revealed that Alibaba will soon launch the next version of the model, further optimized for coding and agentic scenarios; 模型层方面，今年 2 月，阿里发布全新一代大模型 Qwen3.5-Plus，吴泳铭透露，阿里很快还将推出针对 coding 与 agentic 场景进一步优化的下一版本模型；

    • As of February this year, the number of monthly active users of Qianwen App's C-end exceeded 300 million, and during the Spring Festival, over 140 million users completed their first AI shopping experience through Qianwen App's intelligent agent function;

    In terms of instant retail, this quarter's instant retail revenue, including Taobao Flash Sale, reached 20.842 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 56%, driving double-digit growth in both Taobao App's monthly active buyers and 88VIP users, with the number of 88VIP users currently approaching 60 million.

Regarding longer-term business goals, Wu Yongming announced during the conference call: In the next five years, cloud and AI commercialization revenue , including MaaS, will exceed 100 billion US dollars . 在更长远的商业目标上，吴泳铭在电话会上宣布：未来五年，包含 MaaS 在内的 云和 AI 商业化收入将突破 1000 亿美元 。

item.title: AI 冲击就业，汇丰拟裁员 2 万人
item.guid: AI-冲击就业，汇丰拟裁员-2-万人
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, HSBC Holdings is evaluating a three-to-five-year medium-term redundancy plan, with potential job cuts of approximately 20,000 positions, accounting for 10% of its global workforce of about 210,000 employees. 据彭博社报道，汇丰控股正在评估一项为期三至五年的中期裁员计划，潜在裁员规模约达 2 万个职位，占其全球约 21 万名员工总数的 10%。

The core driver of this redundancy plan is CEO Georges Elhedery's strategic bet on AI technology – to massively compress the size of middle and back-office operations through AI. 此次裁员计划的核心驱动力，是 CEO Georges Elhedery 对 AI 技术的战略押注——通过 AI 大规模压缩中后台规模。

According to informed sources, the most affected positions are expected to be middle and back-office roles within global service centers that do not directly face clients. Some job reductions may be achieved by not filling vacancies, selling businesses, or exiting certain markets, rather than solely through direct layoffs. Following the announcement, HSBC's share price briefly fell by 2.3% in the Hong Kong market yesterday. 据知情人士透露，受影响最大的预计是全球服务中心内不直接面向客户的中后台岗位。部分职位削减可能通过不再填补空缺、出售业务或退出部分市场来实现，而非单纯的直接裁员。消息公布后，汇丰股价昨日在香港市场一度下跌 2.3%。

It is worth noting that since Elhedery took office as CEO in 2024, he has implemented a series of drastic restructuring measures at HSBC, cumulatively cutting thousands of jobs, while also selling, merging, or closing some businesses. 值得注意的是，Elhedery 自 2024 年出任 CEO 以来，已对汇丰实施了一系列大刀阔斧的重组措施，累计裁减数千个职位，同时出售、合并或关闭部分业务。

A report released last year by Bloomberg Intelligence shows that as AI gradually takes on tasks previously performed by humans, major global banks may collectively cut up to 200,000 jobs within the next three to five years, with chief information officers and chief technology officers surveyed on average expecting a net reduction of about 3%. 彭博行业研究去年发布的报告显示，随着 AI 逐步承担原本由人工完成的任务，全球各大银行未来三至五年内可能合计削减多达 20 万个职位，受访的首席信息官和首席技术官平均预计净裁员幅度约为 3%。

item.title: 💡 苹果 CEO 库克：iPhone 不会消失，将继续成为数字生活的中心
item.guid: 💡-苹果-CEO-库克：iPhone-不会消失，将继续成为数字生活的中心
item.description:
Apple CEO Tim Cook recently gave an exclusive interview to blogger Nikias Molina at Grand Central Terminal in New York. 苹果 CEO 蒂姆·库克（Tim Cook）日前在纽约中央车站接受了博主 Nikias Molina 的专访。

When discussing the future of the iPhone, Cook stated: "The iPhone is not going away; it's going to be around for a very long time. There are many more things we can do with the iPhone, and I think it will continue to be the center of people's digital lives." 在谈及 iPhone 的未来时，库克表示：「iPhone 不会消失，它将在很长一段时间内继续存在。我们还有很多事情可以用 iPhone 去做，我认为它将继续成为人们数字生活的中心。」

When asked about the "next big thing" after the iPhone, Cook did not point to a specific product but attributed Apple's future to "people and culture." 在被问及 iPhone 之后「下一个大事件」时，库克并未指向某款具体产品，而是将苹果的未来归结为「人与文化」。

He believes that the intersection of hardware, software, and services is the source of Apple's magic, and "the ecosystem is at the core of everything." He also stated that it is certain that future innovations "will be very cool and very creative." 他认为，硬件、软件与服务的交汇处才是苹果魔力的来源，「生态系统是一切的核心」。 他同时表示，可以确定的是，未来的创新「将会非常酷、非常有创意」。

Regarding how to maintain the humanistic warmth of technology amidst the AI wave, Cook's answer was: "Always focus on the user. If you are always dedicated to enriching the lives of others, then what you create will be good for the world." 对于 AI 浪潮下如何保持技术的人文温度，库克的回答是：「始终以用户为核心。如果你始终致力于丰富他人的生活，那么你所创造的东西对世界来说就是好的。」

Next year, the iPhone will celebrate its 20th anniversary. In the first quarter of this year, iPhone revenue reached a record high of $85.2 billion. Cook described the demand this quarter as "stunning" and stated that "iPhone delivered its best quarter ever, with unprecedented demand and record performance in every geographic market." 明年 iPhone 将迎来问世 20 周年。今年第一季度，iPhone 营收达到 852 亿美元，创下历史新高。库克将这一季度的需求形容为「令人震惊」，并表示「iPhone 实现了有史以来最佳季度表现，需求空前，每个地区市场均创下历史记录」。

item.title: 飞书发布官方「龙虾」
item.guid: 飞书发布官方「龙虾」
item.description:
Yesterday, Feishu officially released the official version of "Lobster" aily, allowing users to activate and own their exclusive Agent with just one click. 昨天，飞书正式发布官方版「龙虾」aily，用户只需一次点击，即可激活并拥有属于自己的专属 Agent。

According to the introduction, similar to OpenClaw's capabilities, Feishu aily's intelligent partners are deeply embedded in enterprise workflows, with built-in Feishu office skills, supporting the creation and update of various business skills with zero threshold, and capable of accumulating memory and automatically learning and optimizing in real work. 据介绍，与 OpenClaw 能力类似，飞书 aily 的智能伙伴深度嵌入企业工作流，内置飞书办公技能（skills），支持零门槛创建与更新各类业务技能，并能在真实工作中沉淀记忆、自动学习优化。

The core advantage of Feishu aily lies in the high-quality contextual data accumulated by the platform over many years. Once integrated, the intelligent agent can understand the entire work environment, including documents, schedules, and messages, allowing users to quickly implement it without complex configurations. Feishu aily Pro also supports carrying more complex operations and information presentation in the form of an independent web client. 飞书 aily 的核心优势在于平台多年沉淀的高质量上下文数据。接入后，智能体即可理解文档、日程、消息等全部工作环境，用户无需复杂配置即可快速落地。飞书 aily 专业版还支持以独立 Web 端形式承载更复杂的操作与信息呈现。

In terms of the permission system, Feishu aily strictly aligns with the user's own permissions, ensuring controllable operations and data security. 在权限体系上，飞书 aily 与用户本人严格保持一致，确保操作可控与数据安全。

item.title: Qwen3.5-Max-Preview 登场 LM Arena，冲进全球前五
item.guid: Qwen3.5-Max-Preview-登场-LM-Arena，冲进全球前五
item.description:
Early this morning, Qianwen (Qwen) officially released the flagship model preview version Qwen3.5-Max-Preview, making its public debut on the global large model arena LM Arena and achieving a score of 1464 points. 今天凌晨，千问（Qwen）正式发布旗舰模型预览版 Qwen3.5-Max-Preview，并在全球大模型竞技场 LM Arena 上公开亮相，斩获 1464 分的成绩。

With this achievement, Alibaba's Qianwen entered the top five globally in the LM Arena's global large model company rankings and secured the number one position in China. 凭借这一成绩，阿里千问在 LM Arena 全球大模型公司排行榜中跻身全球前五，并拿下中国第一的位置。

In this evaluation, the key performance highlights of Qwen3.5-Max-Preview are as follows: 在此次测评中，Qwen3.5-Max-Preview 的核心表现亮点如下：

    Under conditions without style control, overall performance ranks sixth globally and first in China;

    Mathematical ability ranks fifth globally;

    Expert-level text capability ranks tenth globally.

item.title: 曝 Gemini App 将推出 Mac 版
item.guid: 曝-Gemini-App-将推出-Mac-版
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, yesterday, Google began privately sharing early versions of the Gemini for Mac app, codenamed "Janus," with some participants in its consumer testing program to gather feedback and troubleshoot issues before its official release. 据彭博社报道，昨日，谷歌已开始向消费者测试计划的部分参与者私下分享 Gemini for Mac 应用的早期版本，代号为「Janus」，以收集反馈并在正式发布前排查问题。

Google informed testers, "This is an early version of the Gemini for Mac app, used to collect user feedback. It currently only includes key features from other clients, not all features." 谷歌向测试者说明，「这是 Gemini for Mac 应用的早期版本，用于收集用户反馈，目前仅包含其他客户端的关键功能，并非全部功能。」

It is worth noting that Google is testing a feature called "Desktop Intelligence" for Gemini for Mac. Similar to Mac AI software like Claude Cowork, this feature will allow Gemini to access other native Mac applications such as Calendar, directly extracting data to provide more personalized answers. 值得关注的是，谷歌正为 Gemini for Mac 测试一项名为「桌面智能」（Desktop Intelligence）的功能。类似于 Claude Cowork 等 Mac AI 软件，该功能将允许 Gemini 接入日历等其他 Mac 原生程序，直接提取数据以提供更具个性化的回答。

The report also mentioned that Apple is developing its own chatbot, codenamed "Campo," as part of an upgraded Siri. It is expected to be released later this year with iOS 27 and macOS 27, and will rely on Google models for AI capabilities. 报道还提到，苹果也在开发代号为「Campo」的自研聊天机器人，作为升级版 Siri 的组成部分，预计随 iOS 27 和 macOS 27 系统于今年晚些时候推出，并将依赖 Google 模型提供 AI 能力支持。

item.title: 蚂蚁数科发布「龙虾卫士」
item.guid: 蚂蚁数科发布「龙虾卫士」
item.description:
Yesterday, Ant Digital Technologies launched the "Ant Tianjian 2.0 – Lobster Guard" AI security protection system and simultaneously initiated the "Lobster AI Security Protection Plan," specifically providing full lifecycle security assurance for enterprises deploying OpenClaw intelligent agents. 昨天，蚂蚁数科推出「蚁天鉴 2.0 – 龙虾卫士」AI 安全防护体系，并同步启动「龙虾 AI 安全守护计划」，专为部署 OpenClaw 智能体的企业提供全生命周期安全保障。

Ant Digital Technologies launched this solution targeting security risks such as privilege escalation, memory pollution, malicious inducement, and abuse of computing power, focusing on three core capabilities: 蚂蚁数科针对权限越界、记忆污染、恶意诱导、算力滥用等安全风险推出该解决方案，聚焦三大核心能力：

    "Combating Ideological Mutation," by accurately identifying input and output content, intercepting illegal information and malicious inducement sources, to prevent models from being "blackened";

    "Purifying the Skills Repository," based on Ant Digital Technologies' CALIR five-dimensional model framework, conducts compliance scanning and behavior auditing of Skills plugins to identify and block risks such as privilege escalation, sensitive data leakage, and abnormal calls;

    "Risk Public Opinion Broadcasting," by generating and actively pushing real-time risk emergency reports, helps enterprises grasp the security situation immediately, achieving a shift from passive defense to proactive response.

In terms of supporting services, the "Lobster AI Security Protection Plan" will offer a 3-month, total of 200,000 free Lobster security protection calls to the first 100 partner enterprises, aiming to help more companies complete security baseline construction at a low cost. 在配套支持层面，「龙虾 AI 安全守护计划」将面向首批 100 家合作企业，提供为期 3 个月、总计 20 万次的免费龙虾安全防护调用服务，旨在帮助更多企业以低成本完成安全基线建设。

item.title: 面壁智能发布「龙虾盒」EdgeClaw Box：给「龙虾」装上安全大脑
item.guid: 面壁智能发布「龙虾盒」EdgeClaw-Box：给「龙虾」装上安全大脑
item.description:
Yesterday, ModelBest officially released the EdgeClaw Box, emphasizing secure and controllable, out-of-the-box usability, and simultaneously open-sourced the upgraded intelligent agent execution framework EdgeClaw in collaboration with Tsinghua University and the OpenBMB community. 面壁智能昨日正式发布 EdgeClaw Box，主打安全可控、开箱即用，并联合清华大学、OpenBMB 社区同步开源了升级版智能体执行框架 EdgeClaw。

    Privacy Routing Middleware : The self-developed Hook mechanism categorizes each user message, tool call parameter, and Agent output into three levels based on sensitivity: S1 for default cloud processing, S2 for automatic de-sensitization before uploading to the cloud, and S3 for mandatory local offline processing, eliminating data leakage risks at the architectural level;

    Dual-Track Memory Mechanism : Cloud models can only access de-sensitized conversation history, while complete information is processed only by local models, preventing private data from being leaked to third-party services through the context window;

    Built-in Edge-side Model : Integrates ModelBest's MiniCPM "Little Steel Cannon" series, allowing simple tasks to be performed without internet connection, with zero token consumption, and usable even in offline environments;

    Out-of-the-Box Usability : Deeply adapted to mainstream hardware such as NVIDIA DGX Spark, Apple Mac Mini, and ModelBest's self-developed Pinecone Pi, requiring no manual deployment, allowing non-technical users to get started directly;

    Layered Cost Reduction Strategy : Based on the principle of "local screening first, cloud assistance," most basic tasks are handled by local models, with only complex tasks pushed to the cloud, significantly reducing token expenditure.

EdgeClaw open source code has been released on GitHub ( github.com/OpenBMB/EdgeClaw ). EdgeClaw 开源代码已发布于 GitHub（ github.com/OpenBMB/EdgeClaw ）。

item.title: 贾国龙推新品牌「天边砂锅焖面」，人均 61 元承接西贝关店员工
item.guid: 贾国龙推新品牌「天边砂锅焖面」，人均-61-元承接西贝关店员工
item.description:
According to Red Star Capital Bureau, Xibei founder Jia Guolong recently quietly launched a new sub-brand, "Tianbian Claypot Braised Noodles," with its first store officially opening in Beijing. 据红星资本局报道，西贝创始人贾国龙近期低调推出新副品牌「天边砂锅焖面」，首店已在北京正式开业。

Business registration information shows that the brand's operating entity is Beijing Xibei Tenggeli Catering Management Co., Ltd., and its controlling shareholder is Inner Mongolia Xibei Catering Group Co., Ltd., where Jia Guolong serves as the legal representative and actual controller. 工商信息显示，该品牌经营主体为北京西贝腾格里餐饮管理有限公司，其控股股东为贾国龙担任法定代表人及实际控制人的内蒙古西贝餐饮集团有限公司。

Staff revealed that the store entered a trial operation phase in January, with menu testing and renovation happening simultaneously, and the official opening was about 10 days ago (early March). "We mainly focus on braised noodles, all new dishes." 店员透露，门店 1 月进入试营业阶段，边试菜边装修，正式开业约在 10 天前（即 3 月初）。「我们主要做的是焖面，都是新菜。」

In terms of pricing strategy, "Tianbian Claypot Braised Noodles" has an average per capita spending of 61 yuan, significantly lower than Xibei's main brand, which ranges from 85 to 104 yuan per person. 在定价策略上，「天边砂锅焖面」人均消费为 61 元，明显低于西贝主品牌 85 元至 104 元的人均水平。

Jia Guolong admitted in a media interview that Xibei plans to close some stores, and he hopes to use the new brand to take over some store assets and employees. 贾国龙在接受媒体采访时坦言，西贝计划关闭一部分门店，他希望借助新品牌承接一部分门店资产与员工。

The Xibei brand will continue to operate; in the future, some stores will be closed, some will be converted to the new brand, and some core stores will be retained.

Staff also confirmed that some Xibei employees have indeed been reassigned to "Tianbian Claypot Braised Noodles." 店员也证实，确实有部分西贝员工已分流至「天边砂锅焖面」。

item.title: 京东外卖全职骑手免费换新装
item.guid: 京东外卖全职骑手免费换新装
item.description:
Yesterday, JD Waimai announced its first anniversary online and officially launched three upgrades in equipment, training, and service, providing all full-time riders with new uniforms free of charge. 昨日，京东外卖宣布上线满一周年，并正式启动装备、培训、服务三项升级，为全体全职骑手免费换发新款骑手服。

The new rider uniforms feature a three-dimensional tailoring process, a more fitted overall design, waterproof fabric, and high-brightness reflective silver strips to enhance rider safety during night and rain operations. 新骑手服采用立体裁剪工艺，整体版型更为贴合，面料具备防水性能并搭配高亮反光银条，以提升骑手在夜间及雨天作业时的安全性。

Additionally, full-time riders will receive exclusive employee ID gold badges and emergency waist bags, forming a professional identification system of "silver strips + gold badges." The first batch of uniform replacements covers full-time riders in Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen, who can apply for them free of charge starting today. 此外，全职骑手还将获得专属工号金标牌及应急腰包，形成「银条 + 金标」的专业识别体系。首批换装范围覆盖北京、上海、广州、深圳四城的全职骑手，即日起可免费申领。

    Training-wise, JD Waimai requires all full-time riders to complete systematic training before starting work, covering standardized service norms for 30 types of scenarios, and implements a "photo required for every successful delivery" system;

    Service-wise, JD Waimai is fully promoting its "On-Time Guarantee" service, promising an order punctuality rate of no less than 99%, with compensation for any overdue deliveries;

    Regarding housing security, JD stated that it will invest an additional 22 billion yuan over the next 5 years to build 150,000 "Rider Homes."

item.title: 多家航司上调国际航线燃油附加费，最高涨幅翻倍
item.guid: 多家航司上调国际航线燃油附加费，最高涨幅翻倍
item.description:
According to Yicai, affected by the rapid rise in international oil prices, several domestic airlines have recently intensively increased fuel surcharges on international routes, with increases generally exceeding 50%, and some routes even doubling. 据第一财经报道，受国际油价快速上涨影响，国内多家航空公司近日密集上调国际航线燃油附加费，涨幅普遍超过 50%，部分航线最高翻倍。

    China Southern Airlines has issued a notice to ticket agents, stating that it will adjust international flight fuel surcharges in batches. Specifically, routes from China to Southeast Asia will increase by 100 yuan per segment, to Australia by 270 yuan, to the UAE by 150 yuan, and to the US by 250 yuan for economy class and 500 yuan for business class;

    Spring Airlines completed its adjustments first on March 11, with fuel surcharges for Shanghai to Kuala Lumpur and Penang routes directly doubling from 180 yuan to 360 yuan; routes from Shanghai to Osaka, Fukuoka, Nagoya, and other Japanese destinations increased from 200 yuan to 312 yuan, an increase of over 50%;

    Juneyao Airlines announced that starting March 20, it will adjust fuel surcharges for routes between China and Southeast Asian countries: China to Vietnam will be adjusted to 400 yuan per segment, to Indonesia to 600 yuan, and to Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, the Philippines, and other places to 550 yuan;

    Xiamen Airlines, starting March 16, increased fuel surcharges for Indonesia-to-China routes from approximately 290 yuan to about 330 yuan, an increase of about 15%. China Eastern Airlines and Loong Air have also successively followed suit with increases.

The direct cause of this round of adjustments is the sharp fluctuation in international oil prices. Previously, international oil prices once exceeded $110/barrel, leading to a significant increase in airlines' jet fuel procurement costs, with the cost pressure ultimately being passed on to ticket prices. 此轮调整的直接诱因是国际油价剧烈波动。此前国际油价一度突破 110 美元/桶，航空公司航油采购成本大幅攀升，成本压力最终向票价端传导。

Regarding domestic routes, the next adjustment window for fuel surcharges is April 5th. Currently, the standard from January 5th this year is still in effect: 10 yuan for segments under 800 kilometers and 20 yuan for segments over 800 kilometers. Industry insiders expect that if oil prices continue to rise, more airlines will follow suit with adjustments, and passenger travel costs may further increase. 国内航线方面，燃油附加费下一轮调整窗口为 4 月 5 日，目前仍执行今年 1 月 5 日的标准：800 公里以下航段收取 10 元，800 公里以上航段收取 20 元。业内预计，若油价持续上行，将有更多航司跟进调整，旅客出行成本或进一步上升。

item.title: LABUBU 电影官宣，《帕丁顿熊》导演执导
item.guid: LABUBU-电影官宣，《帕丁顿熊》导演执导
item.description:
Yesterday, at THE MONSTERS 10th Anniversary Global Tour in Paris, Pop Mart and Sony Pictures jointly announced that they will co-develop a live-action animated film starring THE MONSTERS (LABUBU). 昨天，在 THE MONSTERS 十周年全球巡展巴黎站上，泡泡玛特与索尼影业联合宣布，将共同开发以 THE MONSTERS（LABUBU）为主角的真人动画电影。

The film is currently in its early development stage and is planned to be presented in a combination of live-action and CGI. 影片目前尚处早期开发阶段，计划采用真人实景与 CGI 相结合的形式呈现。

British director Paul King, who directed the 'Paddington' series and 'Wonka', will serve as director and producer, co-writing the script with award-winning screenwriter Steven Levinson. Kasing Lung will be deeply involved in the film's creation, serving as executive producer. 执导过《帕丁顿熊》系列及《旺卡》的英国导演保罗·金将出任导演及制片人，并与屡获殊荣的编剧史蒂文·莱文森共同操刀剧本。龙家升将深度参与电影创作，担任监制一职。

Regarding the production team, Michael Schaefer, who participated in the production of 'The Martian', and Wenxin She, who participated in the production of 'A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood' and 'Wish Dragon', will serve as producers. Brittany Morris will represent Sony Pictures as executive producer. 制片团队方面，曾参与制作《火星救援》的迈克尔·谢弗，以及参与制作《邻里美好的一天》与《许愿神龙》的佘文馨将一同担任制片人，布里特妮·莫里斯则代表索尼影业负责监制事宜。

item.title: 《星际宝贝史迪奇 2》定档 2028 年 5 月
item.guid: 《星际宝贝史迪奇-2》定档-2028-年-5-月
item.description:
Disney's live-action sequel 'Lilo & Stitch 2' has officially been set for release in North America on May 26, 2028. The film's story continues from the first installment released this year, further narrating Lilo's life and adventures with Stitch, the blue alien monster. 迪士尼真人版续集《星际宝贝史迪奇 2》已正式定档 2028 年 5 月 26 日北美上映。影片故事承接今年上映的第一部，继续讲述莉萝与来自外星的蓝色小怪物史迪奇共同生活、冒险的故事。

The film's screenwriter is Chris Sanders, and the main cast includes Maia Kealoha (as Lilo) and Sydney Agudong (as Nani). The role of Stitch will still be voiced by Chris Sanders. 本片编剧为克里斯·桑德斯，主演包括玛雅·凯洛哈（饰莉萝）、西德尼·阿古顿（饰兰莉），史迪奇一角仍由克里斯·桑德斯配音。

item.title: 《超人总动员 3》定档 2028 年
item.guid: 《超人总动员-3》定档-2028-年
item.description:
Pixar and Disney Animation's sequel 'Incredibles 3' has officially been announced for release in North America on June 16, 2028. 皮克斯与迪士尼动画续集《超人总动员 3》正式宣布定档 2028 年 6 月 16 日北美上映。

The film will be directed by Peter Sohn, director of 'Elemental', 'The Good Dinosaur', and 'Partly Cloudy'. Brad Bird, director and screenwriter of the first two installments of the series, will participate as screenwriter and producer, continuing to tell the story of this ordinary family with superpowers. 本片将由《疯狂元素城》《恐龙当家》《暴力云与送子鹳》导演彼得·孙执导，系列前两部的导演兼编剧布拉德·伯德则以编剧及制片人的身份参与其中，继续讲述这个拥有超能力的普通家庭的故事。

The first installment of 'The Incredibles' series was released in 2004, and the sequel 'Incredibles 2' met audiences 14 years later in 2018. With the third installment now scheduled, a full 24 years have passed since the series' debut, and 10 years since the previous film. 《超人总动员》系列首部曲于 2004 年上映，续集《超人总动员 2》时隔 14 年于 2018 年与观众见面。此番第三部定档，距离系列首作已过去整整 24 年，距离上一部也有 10 年之久。
